You are a support engineer tasked with recovering lost work for a developer. The developer was working on a repository located at `/home/user/workspace/repo`. They accidentally abandoned a commit that contained an important bug fix in `src/bugfix.py` and they don't remember the commit ID. Your task is to: 1. Find the abandoned commit that modified `src/bugfix.py`. 2. Recover this commit by duplicating it or creating a new commit with its contents, so that it is no longer abandoned. 3. Ensure that the new commit has the exact same file contents for `src/bugfix.py` as the abandoned one.
